create table public.app_versions (
  id uuid not null default gen_random_uuid (),
  version text not null,
  release_type text null default 'stable'::text,
  features_enabled jsonb null default '{"ai_enabled": false, "voice_enabled": true, "advanced_analytics": false}'::jsonb,
  min_required_version text null,
  download_url text null,
  release_notes text null,
  released_at timestamp with time zone null default now(),
  deprecated_at timestamp with time zone null,
  constraint app_versions_pkey primary key (id),
  constraint app_versions_version_key unique (version),
  constraint app_versions_release_type_check check (
    (
      release_type = any (
        array['beta'::text, 'stable'::text, 'deprecated'::text]
      )
    )
  )
) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create table public.blog_posts (
  id uuid not null default gen_random_uuid (),
  author_id uuid null,
  title text not null,
  content text not null,
  published boolean null default false,
  created_at timestamp with time zone null default now(),
  updated_at timestamp with time zone null default now(),
  excerpt text null,
  category text null default 'General'::text,
  featured boolean null default false,
  read_time text null,
  image_url text null,
  constraint blog_posts_pkey primary key (id),
  constraint blog_posts_author_id_fkey foreign KEY (author_id) references user_profiles (id)
) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create table public.downloads (
  id uuid not null default gen_random_uuid (),
  user_id uuid null,
  download_type text not null,
  downloaded_at timestamp with time zone null default now(),
  ip_address text null,
  user_agent text null,
  constraint downloads_pkey primary key (id),
  constraint downloads_user_id_fkey foreign KEY (user_id) references user_profiles (id)
) TABLESPACE pg_default;

- Contents (empty)

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

create table public.usage_logs (
  id uuid not null default gen_random_uuid (),
  installation_id uuid null,
  feature_used text not null,
  usage_count integer null default 1,
  api_cost numeric(10, 4) null default 0.00,
  tokens_used integer null default 0,
  used_at timestamp with time zone null default now(),
  session_id uuid null,
  constraint usage_logs_pkey primary key (id),
  constraint usage_logs_installation_id_fkey foreign KEY (installation_id) references user_installations (id)
) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists idx_usage_logs_feature_date on public.usage_logs using btree (feature_used, used_at) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists idx_usage_logs_installation on public.usage_logs using btree (installation_id, used_at) TABLESPACE pg_default;


- Contents (empty)

create table public.user_installations (
  id uuid not null default gen_random_uuid (),
  installation_id uuid not null,
  current_version text not null,
  last_seen timestamp with time zone null default now(),
  machine_fingerprint text null,
  created_at timestamp with time zone null default now(),
  subscription_status text null default 'free'::text,
  legacy_user boolean null default false,
  constraint user_installations_pkey primary key (id),
  constraint user_installations_installation_id_key unique (installation_id),
  constraint user_installations_subscription_status_check check (
    (
      subscription_status = any (
        array['free'::text, 'ai_pro'::text, 'enterprise'::text]
      )
    )
  )
) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists idx_installations_version on public.user_installations using btree (current_version) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists idx_installations_last_seen on public.user_installations using btree (last_seen) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists idx_installations_machine on public.user_installations using btree (machine_fingerprint) TABLESPACE pg_default;


- Contents (empty)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

create table public.user_profiles (
  id uuid not null,
  email text not null,
  username text null,
  created_at timestamp with time zone null default now(),
  subscription_tier text null default 'free'::text,
  download_access boolean null default true,
  app_version_access text[] null default array['1.0.0'::text, '1.5.0'::text, '2.0.0'::text],
  constraint user_profiles_pkey primary key (id),
  constraint user_profiles_username_key unique (username),
  constraint user_profiles_id_fkey foreign KEY (id) references auth.users (id) on delete CASCADE
) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create table public.users (
  id uuid not null default gen_random_uuid (),
  email text null,
  password_hash text null,
  installation_id uuid null,
  created_at timestamp with time zone null default now(),
  stripe_customer_id text null,
  account_type text null default 'free'::text,
  constraint users_pkey primary key (id),
  constraint users_email_key unique (email),
  constraint users_installation_id_fkey foreign KEY (installation_id) references user_installations (id),
  constraint users_account_type_check check (
    (
      account_type = any (
        array['free'::text, 'beta_tester'::text, 'paid'::text]
      )
    )
  )
) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists idx_users_email on public.users using btree (email) TABLESPACE pg_default;

- Content (empty)

create table public.waitlist (
  id uuid not null default gen_random_uuid (),
  email text not null,
  name text null,
  joined_at timestamp with time zone not null default timezone ('utc'::text, now()),
  interested_in text[] null default array['beta_testing'::text, 'early_access'::text],
  notification_sent boolean null default false,
  notification_sent_at timestamp with time zone null,
  source text null default 'website'::text,
  ip_address text null,
  user_agent text null,
  created_at timestamp with time zone not null default timezone ('utc'::text, now()),
  updated_at timestamp with time zone not null default timezone ('utc'::text, now()),
  constraint waitlist_pkey primary key (id),
  constraint waitlist_email_key unique (email)
) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists idx_waitlist_email on public.waitlist using btree (email) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create index IF not exists idx_waitlist_notification_sent on public.waitlist using btree (notification_sent) TABLESPACE pg_default;

create trigger update_waitlist_updated_at BEFORE
update on waitlist for EACH row
execute FUNCTION update_updated_at_column ();
